subject: [PATCH pynfs v3 24/26] server41tests: test cross-directory rename-over nad_old_entry

2026-06-19.patch_summary: This patch adds a test to the server41tests suite to verify that when a cross-directory rename overwrites an existing file in a delegated directory, the server reports the overwritten entry via nad_old_entry in the NOTIFY4_ADD_ENTRY notification. The patch also fixes _getDirDeleg to initialize cb.changes as a list and use extend() to accumulate notifications, allowing tests to receive multiple CB_NOTIFY callbacks and see all notifications.
